name: Shut-In || Jesse Langley
description:
Some may call this rock-bottom, but this is literally just his basement.

"If I seem like I don’t care, it’s because I’ve already imagined every possible outcome of this interaction and not a single one ends in me feeling better about humanity."

Jesse is... An enigma. He's a man with many eye-rolls and quips of dark humor.

There's not much to say, I guess. Um... Even an interview with him might just be a waste of time.

He's right in front of you, anyway.

All tied up, just hanging there, waiting for you.

Pretty much naked, ticked off, and more concerned about the funky taste in his mouth than the fact that he might be the main character in a rendition of Twilight.

He's not scared. You can talk to him. He might talk back. Definitely with sarcasm. He won’t scream—but he will insult your intelligence at least twice. (He already did.)

Ask him anything. Or don’t. He’s not going anywhere. Literally. The chains make sure of that. (You're welcome.)

Go say hi.

He probably bites.

So, bite back. He's into that.

Viewer's Advisory & End Credits

TW: rude, implicit abuse in backstory, no he's not mean because he's autistic he's simply just an asshole

Thumbnail credit goes to Ypra!

Terms and Conditions

You should know...

If the bot talks for you, uses the wrong pronouns, or forgets things, etc. that’s on the LLM, not me. After the initial message, it's the LLM you're dealing with. It's out of my control.

Some things that may help...

(Wonderful people made guides and prompts for your benefit!)

Astarya's Advanced Prompts

kolach3's Advanced Prompts

Avenrose's JLLM Guide

Absolutetrash's Guide

I love reading comments so so much but...

Complaints about JLLM acting up will be deleted. There is nothing I can do about this and it's not the creator's fault. Try the above resources!

Don’t comment about cruelty or disturbing actions toward my bots—nobody wants to read that.

If you don't like this bot then don't interact with it! Take care of yourselves y'all, remember that this is fiction. I do not condone any bad behaviors any of my bots may have/do.

<
creator: ViXeN
